caption: The video shows a screen capture of a Google Chrome browser window. A small video feed in the upper right corner shows a man with short dark hair wearing a blue collared shirt. The main browser window is predominantly black. At the top of the interface, a search bar contains a URL starting with "ScalaHost" and ending with "name: '%20%20'". To the left of the main dark area is a vertical toolbar with icons for a magnifying glass, a plus sign, a minus sign, and other utility tools. Above the black area, the word "Explore" is visible next to a search field containing the text "Enter documents". In the top right of the browser interface, buttons for "Split", "Last 1 hour", and "Close All" are visible, alongside a blue button that reads "Run Query". The scene remains virtually static across the sequence, with no significant movement or changes in the interface.
